SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-13-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-18-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 WE CAN NOT CLOSE OUR BUSINESS & ATTEND THAT COURT DATE BECAUSE IT IS A SELF-EMPLOYED BUSINESS. WE CAN NOT AFFORD TO LOSE ONE DAY OF BUSINESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHEN, ZHAO XI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHINA TOWN DRY CLEANER & LAUNDRY(LI, WEI YU-OWNER) $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
